title: Miner's Loot
description: Proper loot from stone and deepslate!
body:
## Description
When installing the "Miner's Loot" datapack in your world, the loot of deepslate and stone will become diverse. With a rare chance, you will be able to get coal, copper, iron from stone. The same with deepslate, but it has more useful loot, for example: iron, gold, redstone, diamond, emerald.
